---
title: "Section 5: Computational and Analytical Learning"
id: "mod001-se01-sec05"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec05"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---




### In this section
<br>

- [Code Example Page](mod001-se01-sec05-sp01.qmd)

- [Code Output Page](mod001-se01-sec05-sp02.qmd)

- [Math Explanation Page](mod001-se01-sec05-sp03.qmd)

- [Worked Calculation Page](mod001-se01-sec05-sp04.qmd)

- [Parameter Exploration Page](mod001-se01-sec05-sp05.qmd)

- [Applied Analysis Page](mod001-se01-sec05-sp06.qmd)

- [Summary Page](mod001-se01-sec05-sp07.qmd)

```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="../04-applied-and-narrative-learning/mod001-se01-sec04-sp07.qmd">

            <span class="nav-title">Summary Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec05-sp01.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Code Example Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
